metadata.title: Scam-compound complex, FARA reputation-laundering, and a paid-disinformation offer to an influencer (Prince Group/Huione/Kok An; Yim Leak; National Consulting Services; Mezink/Ryan Kelly)
metadata.frame: Carefully separated strands - attribute each claim to its actual source; assert NO connections beyond what the evidence or a named source actually states. (1) CAMBODIAN SCAM-COMPOUND COMPLEX (high-grade, background): forced-labor pig-butchering operations - Prince Group/Chen Zhi, Huione, Kok An - plus the Cambodian GOVERNMENT's FARA-registered US 'information warfare' firm. (2) YIM LEAK (separate, authorities-sourced): a Cambodian tycoon (BIC Group/BIC Bank) whom THAI AUTHORITIES (AMLO) link to a scam/laundering network and whose assets they froze; he denies it; UNADJUDICATED. (3) RYAN KELLY'S ALLEGATIONS: the anti-scam creator says he was offered ~$25k via the agency Mezink to spread disinformation concerning Yim Leak, which he frames as FARA + FTC violations; he says his EXPERIENCE analyzing Cambodian scams bolsters his confidence in interpreting the offer. CRITICAL: Ryan Kelly does NOT assert that Yim Leak is connected to the Cambodian scam compounds - his Cambodia-scam expertise is an interpretive-credibility point, not a factual link. The ONLY Yim-Leak-to-scams linkage here is THAI AUTHORITIES', and even that is a distinct network, not established as the Prince Group compounds.
metadata.WARNING: Grade + defamation + attribution discipline. The scam-compound criminal core (Chen Zhi/Prince Group, Huione, Kok An) is HIGH-grade primary (DOJ/OFAC/FinCEN). Yim Leak: the Thai AMLO ~THB8.3bn freeze and the bill-draft inclusion are FACT; his underlying guilt is UNADJUDICATED and he disputes it - allegation, not fact. NCS FARA registration is documented. Ryan Kelly's account (the $25k Mezink offer, its concerning Yim Leak, the FARA/FTC framing) is CREATOR-ALLEGED, single-source, NOT independently corroborated this pass. Mezink is the NAMED CONDUIT in that account, NOT an adjudicated wrongdoer. DO NOT INFER connections nobody asserts: Ryan does NOT tie Yim Leak to the Cambodian compounds; no established link ties Mezink to the Cambodian government / NCS / Prince Group; and authorities' Yim-Leak network is not established as the Prince Group compounds. Overlay edges excluded from the proofs.
metadata.method: DOJ indictment + press release (Chen Zhi); US Treasury/OFAC (Prince Group 146 targets, Kok An) + FinCEN 311 (Huione); on-chain seizure (DOJ $15B BTC, OFAC BTC addresses - cross-ref fetch_ofac/spec-onchain-threat-actor-addresses); FARA registry (National Consulting Services, Inc.); Thai AMLO + regional reporting (Nation Thailand, Bangkok Post, Khaosod, Thai Examiner, The Diplomat); company records (Mezink via Tracxn/CBInsights/LinkedIn); the creator's own video (title 'I was offered $25k to lie to you', Ryan Kelly/YPR). Each cell graded and attributed.

cambodian_scam_compounds.summary: Industrial forced-labor pig-butchering (sha zhu pan) fraud compounds in Cambodia/Myanmar/Laos targeting global (incl. US) victims, with a laundering layer and state-adjacent protection. This is BACKGROUND/CONTEXT - the domain Ryan Kelly has anti-scam expertise in - NOT, by any claim here, tied to Yim Leak.

operators.name: Prince Group / Chen Zhi
operators.detail: DOJ INDICTED Chen Zhi for directing forced-labor scam compounds; OFAC sanctioned 146 Prince Group targets (Oct 2025); DOJ seized ~$15B BTC (largest forfeiture ever); OFAC named 4 Chen Zhi BTC addresses (~$1.8B). Jin Bei casino linked. Chen Zhi reportedly arrested and moved to China.

operators.name: Huione Group
operators.detail: FinCEN Section-311 designation cutting it off from the US financial system as a laundering hub for pig-butchering proceeds AND North Korean cyber-heist funds (ties to the DPRK laundering map).

operators.name: Kok An
operators.detail: OFAC-sanctioned sitting Cambodian senator linked to a ~$10B scam-center network targeting Americans (state-adjacency).

cambodian_scam_compounds.onchain: The Chen Zhi/Prince Group and Huione BTC clusters are exactly the OFAC-designated, on-chain-traceable addresses fetch_ofac ingests (data/ofac_crypto_addresses.json).

cambodia_government_fara_infowar.summary: The Cambodian GOVERNMENT's documented US reputation-laundering channel (distinct from any individual).

points.detail: FARA-registered representative of the Cambodian government; contract signed 2025-02-19 by Don Benton (firm exec, ex-US official) and Koy Kuong (Cambodia's US ambassador); ~$38,000/month to build 'US backing for Cambodia', incl. outreach to Congressional influencers/committees.
A Thai NGO and regional outlets alleged leaked documents describing a Cambodia-hired 'information warfare' plan; provenance contested.

cambodia_government_fara_infowar.note: No established link between NCS/the Cambodian government's campaign and either Yim Leak or Mezink - listed as a separate, documented reputation-laundering example, not a connected one.

yim_leak.summary: A Cambodian tycoon (owner of BIC Group / BIC Bank; superyacht 'Wanderlust') whom THAI AUTHORITIES link to a scam/laundering network and whose assets they froze; he DENIES it; UNADJUDICATED. Authorities' linkage is INDEPENDENT of Ryan Kelly and is NOT established as the Prince Group Cambodian compounds.

points.detail: Thai AMLO froze assets tied to the 'Yim Leak-Ben Smith network' - reported by Nation Thailand (~THB8.3bn) and corroborated by Thai Enquirer ('another 8.2 billion baht from Ben Smith and Yim Leak'), indicating multiple/serial seizures. Investigative coverage by Project Brazen/WhaleHunting ('The Vanishing Princeling') maps the dynastic-alliance laundering network. Yim Leak's name was included in a draft of the US 'Dismantle Foreign Scam Syndicates Act', then removed. NOTE: Yim Leak's network is NOT established as identical to the Prince Group compounds - separate matters.
points.grade: fact (AMLO seizures, multi-source + investigative coverage); scam guilt reported/unadjudicated

points.detail: Yim Leak challenges the AMLO proceedings, says he was 'tarred by misleading information'; aligned PR pieces ('Myth vs Fact: What the international media got wrong about Cambodia's Yim Leak') run his counter-narrative. The existence of an organized pro-Yim-Leak reputation push is the documented context around which Ryan Kelly's offer allegation sits.
points.grade: fact (he disputes; the PR campaign exists) - guilt UNADJUDICATED

yim_leak.grade: authorities' action fact; scam guilt unadjudicated/disputed

ryan_kelly_allegations.summary: Ryan Kelly's account: a paid-disinformation OFFER concerning Yim Leak, framed as FARA + FTC violations, with his Cambodian-scam analysis cited as the basis for his interpretive confidence (NOT as a claim that Yim Leak is part of those scams).

points.detail: Ryan Kelly ('Youth Pastor Ryan' / YPR), a US anti-scam creator, published a video titled 'I was offered $25k to lie to you' (#scam #disinformation #law #ryankelly #ypr), stating he was offered ~$25,000 to spread disinformation, with the influencer-marketing agency Mezink named as the conduit and the actual principals reportedly based in India despite a Singapore presentation.
points.grade: CREATOR-ALLEGED, single-source; video specifics not transcript-verified this pass

points.item: The offer concerned Yim Leak (per Ryan)
points.detail: Per the creator, the disinformation he was asked to spread concerned Yim Leak (a narrative favorable to Yim Leak). This places Yim Leak in Ryan's allegations - as the SUBJECT of the offer - NOT as someone Ryan ties to the Cambodian scam compounds.

points.item: His Cambodian-scam expertise = interpretive-confidence basis, NOT a network link
points.detail: Ryan says his experience analyzing/examining Cambodian scams bolsters his claims - i.e., his accumulated scam-analysis experience gives him (in his view) higher precision/accuracy in INTERPRETING this offer. This is an EXPERIENTIAL/credibility point. He does NOT assert that Yim Leak is connected to the Cambodian scams.
points.grade: creator's stated reasoning (interpretive confidence) - explicitly NOT a factual Yim-Leak<->Cambodia-scams link

points.detail: Paying a US influencer to push a FOREIGN principal's narrative without registering is a FARA felony; a foreign (Cambodian) subject/principal is what would make the offer a FARA matter, per Ryan. Precedent: the 2024 Tenet Media/RT indictment.
points.grade: fact (framework + precedent); application to this offer is creator-alleged

points.detail: Separately, an undisclosed PAID endorsement/promotion violates FTC Act Sec.5 and the FTC Endorsement Guides regardless of the principal's nationality. Ryan frames the undisclosed-paid-disinformation offer as an FTC matter too.

Mezink (mez.ink) is an AI influencer-marketing agency founded 2021 by Tarun Valecha and Mohit Garg, with a Singapore registered office (160 Robinson Road) and operations across India/SE-Asia (Tracxn/CBInsights/LinkedIn). The 'Singapore presentation, India principals' shape is consistent with the creator's characterization - but Mezink is NOT publicly adjudicated of any crime; it appears as the named conduit.

ryan_kelly_allegations.grade: creator-alleged (offer, subject, FARA/FTC application, interpretive-confidence reasoning) + fact (Mezink record, FARA/FTC frameworks, Tenet precedent)

checks.result: No registration found. Mezink is not a FARA-registered foreign agent as of this pass.

checks.check: Independent corroboration of Ryan Kelly's $25k offer / a Mezink<->Yim Leak link (news/web)
checks.result: None found. The offer and the Mezink-Yim-Leak connection remain single-source (the creator's own video).
CORROBORATED across Nation Thailand + Thai Enquirer (AMLO seizures, Ben Smith/Yim Leak network) + Project Brazen investigative reporting.
Confirmed: AI influencer-marketing automation platform, founded 2021 (Valecha/Garg), Singapore registered office + Jakarta/SE-Asia/India ops. No wrongdoing found.

verification_log.parallel_precedent: Separately documented paid-US-influencer networks (the 2024 Tenet Media/RT FARA case; reported Israel-funded US influencer programs) show the pattern Ryan Kelly's offer would fit - context, not evidence of his specific claim.

mezink_shell_company_fara_check.summary: #69 - the retroactive SHELL-COMPANY + FARA check on Mezink, structured to a conclusion. Both checks come back NEGATIVE: Mezink is a real, identifiable operating company (NOT a shell) and is NOT FARA-registered; the disinformation OFFER remains a single-source creator allegation, not an adjudicated act by Mezink. The registry/corporate facts are fact (verification_log); the not-a-shell conclusion is a graded reading of those indicators.

shell_company_indicators_tested.finding: Mezink (mez.ink) founded 2021; Singapore registered office (160 Robinson Road) + India/SE-Asia ops; profiled on Tracxn/CBInsights/LinkedIn
shell_company_indicators_tested.shell_signal: NEGATIVE (a registered, profiled entity, not a paper-only vehicle)

shell_company_indicators_tested.finding: founders Tarun Valecha and Mohit Garg (named, public)
an AI influencer-marketing automation PLATFORM with operations across India/Jakarta/SE-Asia - a functioning SaaS business
shell_company_indicators_tested.shell_signal: NEGATIVE (operating product, not a dormant entity)

shell_company_indicators_tested.indicator: The 'Singapore presentation / India principals' shape the creator flagged
shell_company_indicators_tested.finding: consistent with a normal India-SE-Asia SaaS domiciled in Singapore - a common, legitimate structure, NOT by itself a shell indicator
shell_company_indicators_tested.shell_signal: INCONCLUSIVE/benign (jurisdictional optics, not evidence of a front)

mezink_shell_company_fara_check.fara_check: FARA eFile (efile.fara.gov) searched for 'Mezink': NO registration found. Mezink is not a FARA-registered foreign agent. (Separately, NO independent corroboration of the ~$25k offer or any Mezink<->Yim-Leak link was found this pass - the account is single-source.)
mezink_shell_company_fara_check.conclusion: On the available record Mezink is a REAL operating AI influencer-marketing firm (not a shell) and is NOT FARA-registered. The retroactive checks therefore do NOT surface a hidden-front or unregistered-foreign-agent finding. What remains is a SINGLE-SOURCE creator allegation (Ryan Kelly) that Mezink was the conduit for a paid-disinformation offer concerning Yim Leak - if substantiated, that COULD raise FARA (foreign principal) and FTC (undisclosed paid endorsement) questions (precedent: Tenet Media/RT 2024), but the offer itself is uncorroborated and Mezink is the NAMED conduit, NOT an adjudicated wrongdoer. The honest finding is a clean check, not an indictment.
mezink_shell_company_fara_check.grade: registry/corporate facts + the FARA null FACT (verification_log); the not-a-shell conclusion is a graded reading; the offer remains creator-alleged/uncorroborated

what_is_NOT_asserted.purpose: Explicit non-claims, to prevent inferring connections nobody made.
non_claims: Ryan Kelly does NOT connect Yim Leak to the Cambodian scam compounds (Prince Group etc.). His Cambodia-scam experience is an interpretive-confidence point only.
No established link ties Mezink to the Cambodian government, National Consulting Services, or Prince Group.
Thai authorities' 'Yim Leak network' is NOT established as identical to the Prince Group Cambodian compounds - they are separate matters that may or may not overlap.
Yim Leak's guilt is NOT adjudicated; he disputes the allegations.
Mezink is NOT accused/adjudicated of a crime here; it is the named conduit in the creator's single-source account.

edges.raw_instrument: forced-labor pig-butchering crypto fraud; Chen Zhi DOJ-indicted
DOJ ~$15B BTC seizure + OFAC 146 targets + 4 Chen Zhi BTC addresses
FinCEN 311: laundering hub for pig-butchering AND North Korean cyber-heist funds
edges.note: OVERLAY: ties SE-Asia scam economy to DPRK map

edges.raw_instrument: FARA-registered info-war/lobbying contract ~$38k/mo (Don Benton x amb. Koy Kuong, 2025-02-19)
edges.note: OVERLAY: Cambodian GOVERNMENT reputation-laundering; no established link to Yim Leak or Mezink

edges.raw_instrument: froze ~THB8.3bn in the 'Yim Leak-Ben Smith network' (allegations unadjudicated; he disputes; not established as the Prince Group compounds)
edges.note: OVERLAY: authorities' action; INDEPENDENT of Ryan Kelly; guilt unadjudicated

edges.raw_instrument: creator-alleged ~$25k offer to spread disinformation concerning Yim Leak (single-source, uncorroborated); Ryan frames it as FARA+FTC
edges.note: OVERLAY: creator-alleged; Mezink not adjudicated; offer SUBJECT = Yim Leak per Ryan

limits: Scam-compound criminal core (Chen Zhi/Prince Group, Huione, Kok An) = high-grade primary. Yim Leak: AMLO ~THB8.3bn freeze + bill-draft inclusion are fact; scam guilt UNADJUDICATED and disputed. NCS FARA registration documented; 'leaked plan' contested. Ryan Kelly's account (the $25k Mezink offer, that it concerned Yim Leak, the FARA/FTC framing) is CREATOR-ALLEGED, single-source, uncorroborated this pass. EXPLICIT NON-CLAIMS (see what_is_NOT_asserted): Ryan does NOT tie Yim Leak to the Cambodian scam compounds (his Cambodia-scam experience is interpretive-confidence only); no established link ties Mezink to the Cambodian government/NCS/Prince Group; authorities' Yim-Leak network is not established as the Prince Group compounds. Mezink is the named conduit, not adjudicated. Persons: Chen Zhi added (indicted/sanctioned); Yim Leak and Ryan Kelly intentionally NOT given dossiers.
